title: mycobactopia-org/mtbc-resistotyper-nf pipeline - params.input schema
description: Samplesheet schema — per-sample VCF + tabix index. Compatible with XBS's snp_filtered / indel_filtered emit (after a small bcftools-concat adapter that combines the two per-sample VCFs). See docs/CONTRACT.md.

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

vcf.errorMessage: VCF file must exist, be bgzipped (.vcf.gz), and cannot contain spaces

tbi.errorMessage: Tabix index file (.vcf.gz.tbi) must exist alongside the VCF
